S

sendCoOrganizerInvitationNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
Sends a critical notification inviting the user to become a co-organizer of the event.
sendGroupWaitlistInvitationNotification(String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
 
sendInvitationNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
Sends a critical "lottery invitation" notification to the user indicating they were selected from the waitlist.
sendNotSelectedNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
Sends an optional notification informing the user that they were not selected from the waitlist.
sendPrivateWaitlistInvitationNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
Sends a critical notification informing the user that they have been invited to join the waitlist of a private event.
sendWaitlistedNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.FirestoreNotificationHelper
Sends an optional "waitlisted" notification to the user.

Sets the account type.
